chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.191 of 2024 Syed Ali Zahir Hashmi Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1130/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 1131/24 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 1132/24 Dated: 15.05.2024 Mr. S. Zaeem Hyder for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that he would agree if this appeal is disposed of with some directions that for the purpose of recording evidence through commission the application, which was filed by the appellant, could be taken into consideration expeditiously. Such aspect of the matter shall be considered by the learned Single Judge in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant High Court Appeal is dismissed as not pressed, in view of above, along with listed applications. Judge Judge
